MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: James A. Lassart, Esq. 543-4800 for petitioner & moving party; Margaret W. Baumgartner, Deputy City Atty 554-4658 for respondents & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Petition for writ of mandate granted; commission complaint is dismissed with prejudice (with respect to multiple officer exception). Pltf to prepare order approved as to form. (JJM/KF(EX))
